title: City Announces Lane Restrictions for Greenspace Maintenance on West St
summary: City of Syracuse announced a greenspace maintenance project on West Street South (200-300 block of West Fayette Street) scheduled for Saturday, June 10, 2023. Two right lanes will be closed from 6 a.m. to 1 p.m. for shrub removal and soil preparation; wildflower seeds will be planted later. The left lane remains open during work.
department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation and Youth Programs

political_signal.description: Greenspace and landscaping maintenance reflects sustainability and neighborhood beautification priorities aligned with livability goals.
